plant.description: Himalayan Pine tree providing medicinal resin.

medicinal_uses: Used for rheumatism and chronic joint conditions.
Effective for respiratory issues like bronchitis.
Used as a base for many Ayurvedic ointments.

safety_profile.warning: May cause skin irritation if applied directly.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.
